ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was created */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment used for the order */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount for the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's shipping address */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's billing address */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery for the order */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the order */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the order was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "line_items" (
  "line_item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each line item */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order it belongs to */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product ordered */,
  "product_sku" TEXT /* SKU of the product ordered */,
  "price" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "discount" REAL /* Discount applied to the product */,
  "tax" REAL /* Tax applicable to the product */,
  "total" REAL /* Total cost of the line item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("line_item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_line_items_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "billing_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's billing address */,
  "shipping_address_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer's shipping address */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the customer account was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vendors" (
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vendor */,
  "vendor_name" TEXT /* Name of the vendor */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the vendor */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the vendor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the vendor was added */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the vendor information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vendor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each payment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order the payment is associated with */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method used for payment */,
  "amount" REAL /* Amount paid */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the payment */,
  "payment_method_details" TEXT /* Additional details about the payment method */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the payment record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the payment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_payments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory" (
  "inventory_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the inventory record */,
  "product_sku" TEXT /* SKU of the product */,
  "vendor_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the vendor supplying the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Current stock level of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "last_restock_date" TEXT /* Date when the product was last restocked */,
  "expected_restock_date" TEXT /* Expected date for the next restock */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time in days for restocking the product */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the inventory record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the inventory record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("inventory_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_vendor_id FOREIGN KEY ("vendor_id") REFERENCES vendors ("vendor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_product_sku FOREIGN KEY ("product_sku") REFERENCES line_items ("product_sku")
)

CREATE TABLE "shippers" (
  "shipper_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipper */,
  "shipper_name" TEXT /* Name of the shipping provider */,
  "tracking_url" TEXT /* URL to track shipments */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the shipper */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the shipper */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the shipper was added */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the shipper information was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipper_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "shipments" (
  "shipment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each shipment */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order being shipped */,
  "shipper_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the shipping provider */,
  "tracking_number" TEXT /* Tracking number for the shipment */,
  "shipment_date" TEXT /* Date when the shipment was made */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the shipment */,
  "estimated_delivery_date" TEXT /* Estimated date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "created_by" TEXT /* User or system that created the shipment record */,
  "last_updated_at" TEXT /* Last time the shipment record was updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("shipment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_shipments_shipper_id FOREIGN KEY ("shipper_id") REFERENCES shippers ("shipper_id")
)
